welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.projects.title: Projects
welcome.projects.description: Projects are the top-level containers for your work. Each project has its own set of work items, milestones, queues, and workflows. Create separate projects for different teams, products, or initiatives.
welcome.workItems.title: Work Items
welcome.workItems.description: Work items are the core of your workflow — tasks, tickets, bugs, and more. Track status, priority, assignees, due dates, and add comments, relations, and file attachments to keep everything in context.
welcome.queues.title: Queues
welcome.queues.description: Queues help you organize incoming work by category — support requests, alerts, feedback, or general tasks. Assign work items to queues to triage and route them to the right team.
welcome.milestones.title: Milestones
welcome.milestones.description: Milestones let you group work items toward a shared goal or deadline. Track progress with completion counts and due dates to keep your team on schedule for releases, sprints, or campaigns.
welcome.workflows.title: Workflows
welcome.workflows.description: Workflows define the lifecycle of your work items — which statuses are available and how items transition between them. Use the built-in workflows or create custom ones to match your team's process. You can also configure SLA targets per work item type to track response and resolution times.
welcome.inbox.title: Inbox
welcome.inbox.description: Your inbox is a unified view of work items assigned to you across all projects. Use it as your central hub to manage your workload, prioritize tasks, and jump straight into what needs your attention — no matter which project it belongs to.
welcome.feed.title: Feed
welcome.feed.description: The feed shows recent activity across your projects — status changes, new comments, and updates from your team. Stay informed about what's happening without checking each project individually.
welcome.watchlist.title: Watchlist
welcome.watchlist.description: Add work items to your watchlist to track their progress without being directly assigned. Get notified of changes to items you care about, even across different projects.
